results.rendered_html: barhiṣya (wie eben) adj. = barhiṣi dattam  P. 4,4,119 . = barhiṣe hitam u. s. w. gaṇa gavādi zu 5,1,2 . zur heiligen Streu —, zum Opfer gehörig, — tauglich: upahūtāḥ pitaraḥ somyāso barhiṣyeṣu nidhiṣu priyeṣu (ā gamantu)  ṚV. 10,15,5 . āhitāgneḥ sarvameva barhiṣyaṃ dattaṃ bhavati  TBR. 2,1,5,2 .  AIT.
